message:
test(http2/hpack): adapt RFC 7541 vectors to integer codec API changes

Updates the HPACK test suite to match recent integer codec API changes.

- `encode_integer` now takes an explicit prefix byte; update RFC 7541 C.1 vectors accordingly.
- `decode_integer` now consumes the first byte internally; update roundtrip tests and overflow protection test.
- Update static table tests to use `get_static` and `usize` indices.
- Remove `Header::sensitive` usage in tests to match current Header API.

No behavior changes to HPACK codec logic; this is purely keeping the conformance tests compiling and asserting the intended invariants.
